Open Source + SaaS

From Keyword to Ranking Website

SEOplant is the first AI platform that doesn't just build websites — it builds SEO strategies, analyzes your competitors, and generates programmatic content that actually ranks.

Get Started — Free Star on GitHub

Open source under MIT. Or use SEOplant Cloud for one-click deployment.

The Problem With Every AI Website Builder

A

They Build, But Don't Think

Durable, 10Web, Wix AI generate pretty pages. But they have zero SEO intelligence — no keyword research, no competitor analysis, no content strategy.

Pretty but invisible
B

They Write, But Don't Build

Byword, Frase, Surfer SEO generate great content. But after you have the content, you still need to build, deploy, and maintain the site. Different tools, different bills.

Content without a home
C

They Lock You In

Most AI builders host on their own servers. You can't export your code. If they raise prices or shut down, your site goes with them.

Vendor lock-in

SEOplant is different. SEO strategy + site factory + your own server.

One Keyword. Five Minutes. A Complete SEO Website.

1

Enter a Keyword

"Best hiking boots", "London dentist", "Scottish Highlands travel" — any niche, any language.

->
2

AI Analyzes the Market

Scans top 20 competitors, extracts their URL structure, content strategy, schema, and keyword gaps.

->
3

SEO Strategy Generated

Topic clusters, 6-month content calendar, keyword difficulty matrix, programmatic SEO templates.

->
4

Site Built & Deployed

Astro static site with Schema markup, llms.txt, i18n, and 50-5000 programmatic pages. One click to your VPS.

$ python scripts/seo_engine.py plan "best hiking boots" --type ecommerce
$ python scripts/site_builder.py scaffold ./my-site --name "Hiking Gear Pro" --keyword "best hiking boots"
$ python scripts/deployer.py deploy ./my-site hikinggearpro.com --host 12.34.56.78 --caddy

// 5 minutes later...
Site is LIVE at https://hikinggearpro.com

What Makes SEOplant Different

Competitor Teardown Engine

Automatically crawls competitor sites, analyzes their URL structure, content depth, schema markup, and internal linking — then builds a better version.

Programmatic SEO at Scale

One keyword becomes 5000 pages. City pages, product variants, comparison pages, FAQ sections — all generated from templates + structured data.

SEO-First, Not Design-First

Every page is built for ranking: clean URLs, proper heading hierarchy, Schema.org structured data, llms.txt for AI search engines, and automatic internal linking.

Bring Your Own VPS

No platform lock-in. Deploy to your own $5/month server via SSH. Or use Vercel, Netlify, or Cloudflare Pages. Your code, your server, your data.

GEO Built-In (AI Search Optimization)

Optimized for ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, and Google AI Overviews. Auto-generated llms.txt, structured data for AI citation, and AI visibility tracking.

100% Open Source Core

All 5 pipeline modules are MIT licensed. Fork it, modify it, integrate it. The paid cloud version adds real SEO data, multi-site management, and autonomous monitoring.
